scan_output: Single-rule scan failed for grub2_page_poison_argument (rule=xccdf_org.ssgproject.content_rule_grub2_page_poison_argument). Could not verify.

llm_verdict.message:
<invoke>
<function=review_plan>
<parameter=plan_description>
Add kernel boot argument page_poison=1 to GRUB_CMDLINE_LINUX in /etc/default/grub to enable page allocator poisoning, and update existing kernels via grubby.
</parameter>
</function>
<function=read_file>
<parameter=path>
/etc/default/grub
</parameter>
</function>
<function=write_file>
<parameter=path>
/etc/default/grub
</parameter>
<parameter=content>
# GRUB boot loader configuration

GRUB_TIMEOUT=5
GRUB_DISTRIBUTOR="Rocky"
GRUB_DEFAULT=saved
GRUB_DISABLE_SUBMENU=true
GRUB_CMDLINE_LINUX="page_poison=1"
</parameter>
</function>
<function=run_cmd>
<parameter=command>
grubby --update-kernel=ALL --args="page_poison=1"
</parameter>
</function>
</invoke>
